job.job_description:
Job Purpose

Emirates Holidays is the tour operating arm of Emirates, offering a broad range of curated holiday packages to top global destinations including Dubai, the Indian Ocean, the Far East, East Africa, South Africa & Australia. As part of the Emirates Group, we combine the strength of a world-renowned brand with a local, customer-focused approach in Germany. Our passionate team is dedicated to delivering exceptional service and creating unforgettable travel experiences for every customer

As part of the Emirates Group, we combine the strength of a world-renowned brand with a local, customer-focused approach in Germany. Our passionate team is dedicated to delivering exceptional service and creating unforgettable travel experiences for every customer

We know our success is driven by our exceptional people. Our Sales Travel Consultants combine their expertise and passion to create outstanding travel itineraries and carefully ensure our customers receive a seamless & exceptional services which the Emirates brand is renowned for. We are here to create moments which will last a lifetime.

We believe in being a truly customer and colleague centric business. We expect our Sales Travel Consultants to really understand our holidays, so you’ll get the chance to visit some wonderful destinations upon successful completion of your probation. These trips can be hard work, but you’ll see some amazing things and enjoy really unique experiences. Our office in Frankfurt is focused and results driven, but lots of fun. Full of like-minded people who want to share knowledge and spread enthusiasm and enjoy time together.

We are looking for people with lots of enthusiasm and drive to deliver a truly amazing service through every stage of the journey, and you’ll need to be flexible, innovative and passionate & can work both in a team and individually.

Job Outline

  • Sell holidays to our core destinations Dubai, Indian Ocean and Asia and have an ability to piece together an itinerary of twin or multi-centers from ready-made product banks
  • Provide award winning sales & service over the phone, via email & LiveChat & sometimes face to face
  • To achieve monthly your individual and team targets for sales revenue, margin and passengers
  • Ancillary and Upselling of Flights, Rooms, Meal plans, Multi-centres, static tours and Tailormade itineraries.
  • Monitor & Handle all Salesforce Inboxes (Sales) Correspondence within the required SLAs.
  • Ensuring that all forms of contact are handled quickly and with a friendly ‘can-do’ attitude, whilst achieving and exceeding service & sales performance targets against key performance indicators
  • Demonstrate the ability to form valuable relationships with our customers whilst leveraging our brand values to ensure repeat business and creation of a direct customer database.
  • Contribute towards your own personal development by keeping up to date with of our Air & Non-Air Product offerings to ensure an up-to-date knowledge of the EKH Portfolio. This includes destination entry requirements, product updates and tours and excursions offered at the destination.
  • Have the agility and business sense to deal with sudden disruptions such as Force Majeure or other types of crisis situations including, but not limited to cancellation situations pre or post departure.
  • Be able to multi-task in a fast-paced Sales environment.
  • As a small team at Emirates Holidays you will be required to support all departments when operationally required to do so. This could include our service team, marketing or product team.

Qualification

  • Travel and Tourism qualification, i.e. apprenticeship, bachelor’s or master’s degree
  • Mother tongue or business fluent in spoken and written German and English and a confident communicator with proven persuasive and influencing skills
  • Experience working in a Sales environment within the Travel Industry
  • Experience creating travel itineraries from a luxury tour operator or travel agency background.
  • A passion for Dubai, the Middle East and our other destinations.
  • IT literate – proficient in MS office applications. Knowledge of working with GDS/CRS within the travel industry
  • Someone who can think commercially and take responsibility for their own results and always strives to do improve
  • Positive attitude, enjoys working as part of a team and flexible approach
  • Flexibility to work shifts, including evenings, weekends, and bank holidays.

Critical Competencies

  • Delivering
  • Drive
  • Open to Opportunity
  • Collaboration
  • Engaging Others
  • Business Thinking

Information

  • Candidates must have the legal right to live and work in Germany. The Company will not assist in obtaining visas/work permits.

Salary & benefits

Competitive Salary

Competitive Benefits
job.title: Travel Consultant (Sales) Germany

job.company_description: dnata is a leading global air and travel services provider. Established in 1959, the company offers quality and safe ground handling, cargo, travel, catering and retail services in 34 countries across six continents.
job.job_description:
At Travelbag, we make travel a piece of cake. Our knowledgeable experts live and breathe holidays, so they’re always on hand with tips and advice, to help our customers discover somewhere new. Whether they want a relaxing week away or a month-long adventure, we’ve got it covered. We’re owned by dnata Travel, part of the Emirates Group.

We are looking for a Sales Manager to lead our Harpenden team.

In this role you will be responsible for the overall financial and sales performance of your store. This is very much a ‘hands-on’ role for someone with a ‘lead from the front’ approach. You will work closely with your regional manager and with the wider Travelbag management team to deliver sales results whilst championing the Travelbag brand.

Ideally, we are looking for someone with previous travel industry experience who is an inspirational leader and engages with their team to achieve results. You should have strong commercial awareness and financial management experience alongside excellent people management skills. We are also be interested in applications from anyone looking for the next step in their career

Job Accountabilities:

  • Overall responsibility for the day-to-day running of your shop; leading, developing and motivating your team
  • Maximise revenue from a strong sales and customer service focus
  • Deliver the agreed levels of service and quality ensuring targets and goals are achieved
  • Direct and manage your shop within agreed operational and financial budgets. Actively reduce cost base to a minimum operational level to maximise revenue opportunities
  • Work in partnership with the post-sales teams to ensure a high-quality end-to-end service to our customers
  • Pre-empt any caveats and barriers to success by on-going analysis of operations, taking appropriate action to resolve issues
  • Co-ordinate with the wider management team to manage and plan available resource for the provision of call flow
  • Engage with marketing and other sales departments to drive enquiries through increased footfall, local events, improved end-to-end customer experience and championing individual staff knowledge and experience
  • Propose plans for localised revenue generation, including targets, costs and resource management and ongoing performance analysis
  • Contribute to and attend brand events

To be considered for this role, we need you to have the following skills and experience:

  • Extensive experience of working at a strategic level in an inbound travel sales environment either call centre or retail
  • Sound operational management experience
  • A thorough understanding of resource optimisation and delivery
  • An excellent team player, with the ability to contribute and challenge, provide leadership and coaching opportunities within the scope of the performance management process
  • Resilient with the ability to overcome challenges to consistently meet and exceed targets
  • Self-motivated and approaches work with a mature and positive attitude
  • The ability to introduce meaningful and stretching KPIs and maintain focus on achievement
  • The ability to create a dynamic and high-performing team through selection, motivation and development
  • Excellent communication skills - both written and verbal
  • Excellent influencing skills at a senior management level
  • Results-focused and committed to high personal standards and a desire to achieve

We have some fantastic benefits, making us a great place to work:

  • Travel discounts – we have a dedicated Staff Travel Team to help you plan your next adventure
  • 25 days annual leave, increasing to 28 days after 5 full years of service (+ bank holidays)
  • Additional annual leave purchase scheme – so you can pursue your love of travel
  • Company pension scheme
  • Life assurance
  • Low-cost health care for you and your family
  • Employee Assistance programme
  • Mental Health First Aiders
  • Ongoing development – we have an in-house People Development Team

job.title: Branch Manager

job.company_description: dnata is a leading global air and travel services provider. Established in 1959, the company offers quality and safe ground handling, cargo, travel, catering and retail services in 34 countries across six continents.
job.job_description:
At Travelbag, we make travel a piece of cake. Our knowledgeable experts live and breathe holidays, so they’re always on hand with tips and advice, to help our customers discover somewhere new. Whether they want a relaxing week away or a month-long adventure, we’ve got it covered. We’re owned by dnata Travel, part of the Emirates Group.

We are now recruiting for experienced Travel Consultants to join our team of experts at our store in Cheltenham.

To be considered, you need to have experience of selling long haul destinations and tailor-made holidays. You need to have exceptional customer service skills, be driven by your passion for travel and motivated to meet and exceed your targets. GDS experience would also be an advantage.

If you have experience of working in a target driven environment as well as experience of travelling long haul, we'd be happy to hear from you too.

We have a lucrative uncapped commission scheme with average commission of £24K on top of your base salary, however our top performers average £55K in commission!

Depending on experience in your 1st Year you can expect a minimum OTE of £35K rising to £39K in Year 2.

Thanks to Travelbag’s regular marketing activity, you’ll always have plenty of customer enquiries to follow up. And you’ll build fantastic relationships with your customers, whether face to face or over the phone, so they come back to you time and time again. Our impressive number of repeat customers is something we’re incredibly proud of.

When you join Travelbag, you’ll have an initial 4-week interactive training period with our inhouse training team. You’ll then join our ‘academy’ with dedicated support alongside support and coaching from your manager.

You will have lots of opportunities to enhance your product and destination knowledge – including weekly product training from our destination team and supplier hosted events where you can meet others in the industry as well as learn about a product or destination – and there are usually prizes up for grabs!

Our Travel Consultants work 37.5 hours per week 5 days over 7, 9am to 6:00pm. In peak periods we can be open 9am to 9pm to meet our customer demands.

We have some fantastic benefits, making us a great place to work:

  • Uncapped commission scheme.
  • Fam Trips and Incentives - you will visit a key Travelbag location in your first year, in partnership with our suppliers we had 62 spaces on Fam Trips last year!
  • Travel discounts – we have a dedicated Staff Travel Team to help you plan your next adventure.
  • 25 days annual leave, increasing to 28 days after 5 full years of service (+ bank holidays).
  • Additional annual leave purchase scheme – so you can pursue your love of travel.
  • Company pension scheme.
  • Life assurance.
  • Employee Assistance programme.
  • Mental Health First Aiders
  • Belong programme - Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) that play a crucial role in implementing our DEI strategy
  • Ongoing development – we have an in-house People Development Team.
  • Industry/social events – including supplier events.
  • Annual conference where we bring the whole Travelbag Team together.
  • Cycle to work scheme.
  • Long service awards.
  • Reward & recognition programme
  • Volunteer days – one day’s paid leave each year to volunteer with a registered charity.
  • dnata4good – supporting the local communities we work, live and thrive in.
  • Refer a friend scheme.
  • Free eye care tests.
  • Free Taste Card membership– offering discounts on dining out, movies, attractions, takeaways and online shopping. Free tea and coffee in all our shops
job.title: Travel Consultant

Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages, and car rental, among others compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a hyper-personalised service to its members. job.job_description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what’s the next step? Start your journey with us!

We’re seeking an experienced Java Software Engineer to join our Accommodation team in Barcelona, Madrid or Alicante to develop and leverage the best e-commerce technology to create a one-stop-shop for our customers, where they can find the best hotel for their needs and experience amazing post-booking service in our best-rated mobile app. If you’re ready to soar, we’re ready to take you there

Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world’s leading travel subscription platform.

Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – 7.7million Prime members since launching in 2017

More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions

Over 1,700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers.

As a Java Software Engineer in the Accommodation area, you will be in charge of:

  • Work with a top-notch tech stack such as Java 17, Maven, TestNG, Cucumber, Mockito, Oracle, ElasticSearch, BigTable, Redis, Kafka,, Datamesh, Datadog, Kibana; Docker, Kubernetes, Google Cloud Platform, Sonarqube and soon Spring Boot;
  • Create distributed, scalable microservices platforms, where software gets deployed daily, with high quality, clean code, SOLID principles, design patterns and TDD;
  • Be independent when working with the modules on your area of expertise, in any phase of the SDLC;
  • Design & develop advanced systems and innovative solutions that help us solve big problems related to the sales life cycle of a hotel booking. Share them with both technical and non-technical audiences;
  • Code the solutions with the highest quality through good design, attention to detail and test quality. Be a referral of best practices within the team.


You will work in a fully agile organisation, using Kanban practices to deliver business value continuously. You will actively participate in team ceremonies and events, as well as the product definition and ideation processes, as part of a high-performing cross-functional team, working with other top engineers, product managers, architects, UX designers to design, build, operate and evolve the Hotels Domain microservices platform. You will receive mentorship and support to help you develop your career super fast.

What you will do:

  • Deep understanding of software engineering concepts such as OOP, functional programming, concurrency, data structures, design and architecture patterns, databases, APIs etc.;
  • Experience working with the entire software development cycle, including deploying to production and testing (both unit and integration), as well as Cloud and Continuous Delivery environments;
  • Strong data-driven capabilities, analytical skills, design pattern skills and creativity that will allow you to solve complex business and customer problems;
  • Ambition to be the best and provide resilient, high-performing, well-dimensioned solutions to complex problems;
  • Strong focus on quality, and a technical excellence mindset;
  • Excellent communication skills and an open mind to reach agreements for the benefit of the team and your stakeholders;
  • Ability to visually represent your solutions in standard diagrams that can be shared with both technical and non-technical audience;
  • Strong organisational skills. Ability to organise, prioritise and delegate tasks to overcome deadlines in an uncertain environment
  • Fluent English level that will allow you to work in a multicultural environment and communicate at all levels;
  • A strong mindset for continuous learning and improvement, growth and innovation;
  • A team player attitude with a focus on knowledge sharing within a dynamic team;
  • Passion for what you do, willing to improve every day and apply the latest state-of-the-art technology, when possible, to your solutions.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, or other AI-powered coding assistants.
  • Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into software development workflows.
  • AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to debug code, streamline development processes, and enhance productivity.
  • Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.
  • Collaboration with AI: Experience or interest in collaborating closely with AI tools as “pair programmers” to complement traditional software development practices.


What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here’s what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
  • Grow opportunities to empower your career, and unleash your potential! 🚀Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
  • Your Well-being is our Priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome. You’ll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You’ll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.


Wanna take a peek into what it’s like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!

We're seeking an experienced Business Analyst to join our Revenue Management team based in Barcelona, Spain! If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.

Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – over 7.7 million Prime members since launching in 2017.

Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities And Tasks

The International Revenue Business Analyst will be responsible for providing the analytical foundation for market entry strategies and growth. Key responsibilities include:

  • Market Analysis and Strategy: Conduct in-depth analysis of new international markets to assess potential, competition, customer behavior, and profitability.
  • Business Case Development: Elaborate detailed business cases and financial models for new market entries.
  • Performance Monitoring: Define and monitor Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for international expansion initiatives, creating dashboards and tracking to measure success and identify areas for improvement.
  • Cross-Departmental Coordination: Coordinate with relevant teams (e.g., Product Development, Marketing, Legal, Finance, Business Intelligence, IT) to define and implement go-to-market strategies and ensure the creation of necessary capabilities.
  • Data and Tools: Utilize internal data and BI tools to generate business insights that translate into measurable improvements for the expansion program.
  • Collaboration with Data Science: Collaborate with Data Science for the implementation of analytical tools and methodologies specific to international market dynamics.
  • Strategic Contribution: Contribute to cross-departmental strategic initiatives related to global growth and localization.


What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:

  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, etc.), 1 to 3 years of experience in a role with strong analytical component;
  • Strong analytical skills, fast-learner, with high attention to detail and focused on results and productivity;
  • Advanced SQL skills: strong experience on understanding and manipulating big amounts of data, transforming it to relevant metrics and analyses;
  • Advanced Office skills: Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with the Google toolset (spreadsheets, google docs, etc);
  • Knowledge of Google DataStudio (or similar visualization tools) is a plus;
  • Experience presenting, communicating, and collaborating with a variety of stakeholders;
  • A self-starter and team player, with a "can-do" attitude and a positive mindset;
  • Business Proficiency in English.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
  • Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
  • AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
  • Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.


What’s in it for you?

The Best Talent Deserves The Best Benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program. Grow opportunities to empower your career and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
  • Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcomes. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.

  • Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – 7M members in Prime

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

We run one of the biggest and most successful online marketing programs in Travel and we are among the top Google, Meta, TikTok advertisers by spend in Europe - with which we closely collaborate and our strong relationship with them allow us to develop ad-hoc projects and to access new features, products and technologies before they’re widely released.

We’re seeking a Digital Marketing Strategy Manager to join our Display & Video advertising area — a structured thinker and hands-on orchestrator who will drive seamless campaign execution across markets and channels. In this individual contributor role, reporting to the Head of Paid Acquisition Strategy, you will own one or more products (e.g. flights, hotels, trains, car rental) and/or strategic initiatives (e.g. drive brand awareness and consideration, position our brands in new markets, promote our apps, etc) and act as the right hand in enabling cross-functional alignment, improving planning and driving the development of our Upper/Mid-funnel strategy. You’ll help getting insights on the market and competitors, shape acquisition tactics, elevate creative quality, organize delivery milestones, and ensure campaigns are well-structured from brief, to launch, to post-mortem. If you're ready to grow, build, and help shape how we scale paid campaigns at eDO, we're ready to take you there.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

  • Campaign Orchestration & Project Management
  • Orchestrate campaign execution across channels and markets.
  • Own end-to-end campaign planning, from strategy and brief definition to delivery, QA and post-campaign review.
  • Ensure timing, coordination, and quality of all campaign deliverables across teams and markets. Drive cross-functional alignment between Media, Product Marketing, Creative and Measurement to ensure seamless delivery.
  • Manage key workstreams — including Campaign Kickoffs and Post-Mortems — ensuring agendas, documentation, and next steps are clear, structured, and actionable.
  • Marketing Strategy
  • Define and oversee the rollout of the Full-Funnel framework, from pilot concepts to execution and scalability.
  • Maintain and evolve the market and campaign Benchmark, covering creative trends, competitor tactics, formats, audiences, and media execution examples.
  • Develop campaign briefs and oversee creative asset quality to ensure alignment with both brand positioning and performance objectives.
  • Process
  • Improve internal ways of working by strengthening visibility, standardisation, and operational discipline.
  • Contribute to the maintenance and evolution of campaign templates, planning frameworks, briefing models, and knowledge documentation.
  • Keep the channel knowledge base updated to support learning, scalability, and operational efficiency across markets.


what do you need to succeed:

Job Requirements

Must-Have’s

  • 5+ years of experience in project management, campaign orchestration, or digital marketing operations.
  • Hands-on experience coordinating multi-stakeholder workstreams and managing deadlines across teams.
  • Solid understanding of digital paid media fundamentals (channels, formats, funnel logic, targeting, KPIs).
  • Ability to turn complex input from multiple teams into clear next steps, timelines, and structured documentation.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with confidence to align different teams around shared goals.


Good to have

  • Experience working closely with creative teams on briefs, asset reviews, or content delivery.
  • Exposure to full-funnel frameworks, awareness tactics, and brand-performance integration.
  • Familiarity with campaign measurement concepts (conversion objectives, lift tests, incremental KPIs).
  • Experience collaborating within cross-functional environments, including Marketing, Product, Creative or Analytics.
  • A passion for operational excellence: ability to simplify complex workflows and make them scalable.
  • Curiosity for creative best practices and enthusiasm for evaluating ad quality, formats, and storytelling.
  • Strong documentation mindset: disciplined, detail-oriented, and committed to building processes that last.
  • Adaptability and learning agility: enthusiastic about continuously improving and iterating how we work and deliver campaigns.


and what's in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture. Here's what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
  • Grow opportunities to empower your career, and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
  • Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome, not time-in-seat. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.


Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

job.job_description:
Accommodation Strategy Associate - (Hybrid)

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!

We're seeking an experienced an Strategy Associate to join our Accommodation team in Barcelona (hybrid) to contribute to and deliver on our overall accommodation strategy. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.

Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – over 7.7 million Prime members since launching in 2017.

More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions Over 1,700 employees

More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

The Strategy Associate will be a key person within the Accommodation area. The candidate will use excellent analytical, strategic and communication skills to contribute to and deliver on our overall accommodation strategy. Y ou will be working closely with cross-functional teams - Analytics, Marketing, Product, Supply, Prime and Revenue management to make improvements happen, and you will be measured on the impact that those improvements make.

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Strategy Associate in the Accommodation team you will be in charge of:

  • Work with the Accommodation area Senior Strategy Manager to formulate and deliver approaches to growing the value created by our Accommodation department.
  • Ensure achievement of area objectives and KPIs, by working hand-to-hand with other stakeholders (Marketing, Product, Supply, Pricing, etc).
  • Present area performance and business opportunities identified to the Accommodation leaders and eDreams C-level.
  • Generate hypotheses, perform analyses and communicate insights to gain in-depth understanding of our trading and spot opportunities to maximize our area’s performance.
  • Identify dependencies between projects and define solutions.
  • Inspire growth by proposing ideas and hypotheses on the strategy of the area based on analysis and cross-functional discussions - leveraging our Prime proposition.
  • Continuously problem-solve throughout the process.


What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:

  • At least 3 years of experience in business strategy related roles; past experience with data analytics is a must (consulting, start-ups, tech companies).
  • Expert-level proficiency in SQL and data visualisation tools (e.g., Looker).
  • Outstanding analytical skills and eye for detail: ability to generate insights and use data to inform strategic and business decisions.
  • Proactive, committed and highly motivated person, with high levels of ownership.
  • Strategic mindset with hands-on mentality, a problem-solver.
  • Strong interpersonal skills, being able to perform in a fast-paced environment with cross-functional teams.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.
  • Experience in the travel industry is not a must. Bachelor or Master degree in Business or STEM.
  • Fluency in English.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
  • Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
  • AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
  • Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.


What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.

  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.

job.job_description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, What’s the next step? Start your journey with us!

We are looking for an Accommodation Sales Contractor (EN/FR) to join our Accommodation team based in Barcelona (Hybrid). Reporting to the Head of Sales you will be a key player helping the Accommodation team to build and grow its supplier portfolio of online accommodations, by contracting targeted hotels in strategic markets. You will succeed at signing new independent hotels to be part of the Odigeo Connect Dynamic Package Agreement by negotiating successfully in a constructive, consultative, and collaborative manner. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.

Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – over 7.5 million Prime members since launching in 2017.

More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions

Over 1,700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe. We are a tech company revolutionising the travel booking experience through our consumer insight, innovative technology, market leadership, and Prime, the world's first travel subscription program.

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

  • Cold calling and influencing accommodation providers to add their establishment to the Odigeo Connect Platform via email & telephone (travelling might be required).
  • Be the permanent contact person for your designated source lodging portfolio until they are fully signed.
  • Gather market and customer information and create a database in our Customer Relationship Management system (Salesforce).
  • Create a friendly, helpful relationship with the lodging provider.

job.job_description:
SEO Content Marketing Specialist - (Hybrid)

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!

We are seeking a specialist in SEO Content Marketing Specialist to join our team within the SEO Department, to support implementing the global content strategy. The ideal candidate will have experience in planning and executing SEO-focused content campaigns, using creative and data-driven approaches that support the growth of the organic business.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

 Join the world's leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.

Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – over 7.7 million Prime members since launching in 2017.

More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions.

Over 1,700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts.

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do: The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a SEO Content Marketing Specialist in the SEO Department you will be in charge of:

  • Execute the SEO Content Marketing strategy and roadmap, in multiple markets and languages, which delivers world-class content messaging and drives growth on the organic channels;
  • You will produce, maintain, review and update content materials, ensuring that they meet quality standards (user-focused, relevant, well-written, etc.) and are optimized and aligned with our SEO and link-building strategies, driving growth;
  • You will perform keyword research and define a keyword universe that aligns with audience needs, business priorities and inbound traffic goals, collaborating with other internal and external teams, as needed;
  • You will collaborate with other teams (PR, Social Media, etc.) in the production of campaigns to ensure alignment and leverage the expertise of other teams;
  • You will manage multiple content projects in parallel; hence, project management skills are essential;
  • You will collect KPIs and analyze the performance of the different initiatives;
  • You understand the competitive landscape and can leverage industry knowledge to improve the content initiatives.


What you need to succeed: Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:

  • 5 years of experience in digital marketing roles, working on large-scale B2C organizations;
  • Minimum 3 years of direct experience in SEO Content Marketing roles with a proven track record of implementing successful campaigns, driving company growth;
  • Experience in the travel sector is highly valued;
  • Generative AI knowledge and practical experience for content creation are highly desirable (gen AI tools, prompting knowledge, etc.);
  • Bachelor’s degree preferably related to Digital Marketing and Communication, or Journalism;
  • Fluent in English (written and spoken). Also, a proficient level of another EU language is highly valued (French, German, Italian, Portuguese);
  • High-quality content creation skills and demonstrable experience are required;
  • Advanced usage of SEO tools, such as Ahrefs or Sistrix;
  • Good understanding of web analytics tools;
  • Highly organized and detail-oriented;
  • Team player, proactive, motivated, curious, determined, can-do attitude.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, or other AI-powered coding assistants;
  • Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into software development workflows;
  • AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to debug code, streamline development processes, and enhance productivity;
  • Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities;
  • Collaboration with AI: Experience or interest in collaborating closely with AI tools as “pair programmers” to complement traditional software development practices.


What’s in it for you?

Benefits

 The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle;
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program;

  • Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best;
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices;
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.

job.job_description:
Senior SEM Specialist - (Hybrid)

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!

We are building a world-class Search Engine Marketing organization and are seeking a highly motivated and strategically-minded Senior SEM Specialist to join one of the most efficient SEM teams in Europe. Composed of SEM Account Managers, Analysts, Data Scientists, and Data Engineers, we are among the top Google and Microsoft Bing customers by spend in Europe.

This is a key strategic role within eDreams Odigeo that will help shape the future of the business. You will work alongside Country Managers, Product Managers, Pricing Analysts, Marketing Analysts, and many more, acting as a strategic PPC expert.

The SEM team members are passionate about data, automation, and innovation, thriving in a collaborative and agile environment. They are eager to learn, deep dive into complex challenges, share constructive feedback, and constantly challenge the status quo.

We are looking for a leader in execution who can take things to the next level. As part of an agile team, you will have the opportunity to drive forward long-term strategic initiatives autonomously, design and implement best-in-class campaigns, and contribute to our high level of automation and strategic direction.

Join us and help us reach our ambitious goal of becoming the global leader in online travel!

Why eDreams ODIGEO Join the world's leading travel subscription platform.

2 1 million customers – 44 markets – 5 brands – over 7.7 million Prime members since launching in 2017.

More than 100 million searches per day - Up to 6 billion daily AI predictions

Over 1,700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts -

We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do: The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Senior SEM Specialist, your role extends beyond execution to include strategic leadership, mentorship, and significant business impact:

  • Strategic Leadership & Planning: Build and drive long-term PPC strategies that contribute to sustained business growth, aligning PPC efforts with overarching business objectives and the broader marketing mix.
  • Performance Optimization & Risk Mitigation: Conduct complex data analysis to uncover strategic patterns, translate these findings into actionable strategies, and proactively identify potential risks within PPC initiatives, developing robust mitigation and contingency plans.
  • Cutting-Edge Execution & Standards: Plan, design, implement, and optimize highly effective SEM campaigns across all our brands & products, ensuring execution adheres to best-in-class industry standards and sets a high performance benchmark. Provide operational guidance and coordination within assigned scopes.
  • Business Acumen & Strategic Optimization: Steer spend and revenue of the SEM campaigns towards given targets by deciding on the right bid strategies, strategically optimizing PPC spend across diverse program scopes to maximize performance, volume, and ROI, considering company-wide KPIs.
  • Forecasting & Innovation: Contribute to forecasting and scenario planning, providing valuable insights to the leadership team. Champion a culture of experimentation and innovation, proactively exploring new platforms and methodologies to maintain our technical edge.
  • Stakeholder Management & Communication: Serve as the primary contact for key high-level stakeholders. Influence strategic decisions by effectively presenting complex, data-driven insights in high-level executive summaries to peers, managers, and external partners (e.g., Google, Microsoft).
  • Team Guidance & Expert Mentorship: Act as a recognized subject matter expert who elevates the team's capabilities by providing in-depth technical guidance, disseminating best practices, and fostering a culture of continuous learning and development.
  • Agile & Collaborative Work: Take full ownership of chosen quarterly strategic initiatives, coordinating the working team to achieve the objective, and closely collaborating with other departments to align actions towards common company targets.


What can you expect:

  • Strategic Impact: Make a direct, high-level impact on Odigeo's success by steering and strategically shaping one of its biggest acquisition channels.
  • Scale and Autonomy: Work at scale across all Brands, Products & Markets with large, open budgets and a high level of autonomy as part of an agile, self-organizing team.
  • Mastery Focus: Become a Top Tier SEM Professional by working in one of the best SEM teams, fully committed to automation, innovation, and technical mastery. The role is designed for those who want to deepen their expert knowledge and drive leading-edge results.
  • Collaboration with Peers: Collaboration, Exchange and Discussion seeing eye to eye - Odigeo's SEM team consists of Senior experts (min 5+ years of experience) who are focused on challenging each other to achieve unrivaled excellence in the field.
  • An awesome multicultural team that values open communication, different opinions, learning, testing, continuous optimization, and having fun in and outside of work.


What you need to succeed: Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:

  • Experience: Minimum 5+ years of demonstrable experience in SEM/PPC, ideally managing high 6-figure+ monthly budgets.
  • Strategic & Technical Expertise: Excellent, in-depth knowledge of Google Ads and Microsoft Bing, including advanced bid strategy design and implementation. G Ads certification is a plus.
  • Mandatory Quantitative Background: A degree in a highly quantitative field is required (e.g., Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, or similar quantitative Business fields).
  • Exceptional Data-Driven Leadership: Superior skill level in data analysis, interpretation, and complex data storytelling. You must be able to analyze big datasets, find non-obvious patterns, discover deep strategic insights, and articulate these findings clearly for executive decision-making.
  • Technical Data Proficiency: Advanced level in MS Excel is mandatory. Strong practical knowledge of web analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics) and experience working with data querying languages (e.g., SQL) or advanced statistical software is highly beneficial.
  • Influence & Mentorship: Proven ability to constructively challenge the status quo, influence strategic decisions, and provide effective mentorship and guidance to junior team members.
  • Ownership & Acumen: Strong Sense of Ownership, taking the lead on end-to-end strategic initiatives with a can-do attitude. Demonstrable business acumen beyond core PPC metrics.
  • Language Skills: Fluent English is mandatory; additional European-based language is a plus.
  • Mindset: Experience working in an agile environment and/or in the travel sector is a plus. Always striving to grow & learn, embracing a 100° feedback culture.
  • AI & Automation Mindset: Experience in leveraging AI for strategic PPC campaign optimization, automation, and reporting is a strong plus.


What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and the possibility of choosing your equipment and, even better, keeping it for free after 3 years.
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
  • G row opportunities to empower your career, and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
  • Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome, not time-in-seat. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.


Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

Prime Associate Business Analyst (Hybrid)


As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!


We're seeking an experienced Prime Associate Business Analyst to join our Prime Team in Barcelona (hybrid) to help define the broader talent strategy across multiple teams. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.



Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.


Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – 7M members in Prime

More than 100 million searches per day - Up to 6 billion daily AI predictions[e1]

Over 1,600 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts - 36 average age


We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe. We are a tech company revolutionising the travel booking experience through our consumer insight, innovative technology, market leadership, and Prime, the world's first travel subscription program.




What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks


As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Prime Business Analyst in the Prime Analytics team you will be in charge of:


  • The Prime Business Analyst’s mission is to contribute to the Prime strategic roadmap with business insights, ie. to generate business insights from data analysis so that they can translate into improvements for the program.
  • Responsible for execution of key analysis, being the data entry point for the business team and including taking ownership of the database from the business side. Understand the business needs, gather the data and present the key insights: “Contribute to the Prime strategic roadmap with numbers”.
  • Elaborate business cases to support strategic product decisions: e.g. should we include more “benefits” into the program? What is the profitability of a free-trial?
  • Create dashboards and tracking: master the internal Business Intelligence tools to contribute to the monitoring and tracking of our business KPIs. Work with data engineering and data science teams to be able to leverage all our internal data
  • Contribute to the delivery of the Prime strategic projects: participate in the delivery of the key internal projects, giving support from the business side to ensure progress and effective delivery of the desired outcomes.
  • Work together with product and Marketing in the execution of the projects, giving support from the analytical and business side.



What you need to succeed:

Good to have


Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:


  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, etc.).
  • Experience in a role with a strong analytical component is a plus.
  • Knowledge of SQL, as well as experience in working with databases and large sets of data; and experience with Google DataStudio is required
  • Advanced Office skills. Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with the Google toolset (spreadsheets, google docs, etc).
  • Strong analytical skills, fast-learner, with high attention to detail and focused on results and productivity.
  • A self-starter and team player, who also enjoys to have fun!
  • Business Proficiency in English.




What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here’s what we offer:


  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, Competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and the possibility of choosing your equipment and, even better, keeping it for free after 3 years.
  • Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
  • Grow opportunities to empower your career, and unleash your potential! 🚀Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
  • Your Well-being is our Priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome, not time-in-seat. You’ll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You’ll work in an Agile Mindset environment with recognition at our core.



Wanna take a peek into what it’s like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

job.company_description: eDreams ODIGEO is the world’s leading travel subscription platform. It pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages, and car rental, among others compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a hyper-personalised service to its members. job.job_description:
Associate Data Engineer - Math/ Physics/ Science/Engineering graduates - (Temporary)

Location: Barcelona

Duration: 6 Months (with option for permanent role)

Start Your Journey With Us!

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself: what’s the next step? eDreams ODIGEO is looking for talented individuals to join our Performance Marketing Technology Team as a STEM Graduate.

This is a unique opportunity to act as a catalyst for our automation roadmap. You will support our Senior Data Engineers in maintaining the high-scale infrastructure that powers our AI-driven growth strategies, while learning from some of the best in the business. No prior professional experience in travel or marketing is required—we are looking for fast learners who are ready to dive into the deep end of Big Data.

Why eDreams ODIGEO?

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription program, which has topped over 7.7 million members.

  • Scale: More than 100 million searches per day — more than 6 billion AI daily predictions.
  • Collaboration: We are among the top Google, Meta, and Microsoft Ads customers by spend in Europe, allowing us to access new features and technologies before they are widely released.
  • Diversity: Over 1,700 employees from more than 60 different nationalities.


The Online Marketing and Technology Team

Our team is composed of Analysts, Data Scientists, Data Engineers, and Online Marketers who are all passionate about innovation. We use our brains to develop new solutions—designing and building technologies to execute tasks that can only be executed at scale by machines. If you have a background in Mathematics, Physics, or Engineering and are looking for a place to leverage your curiosity and problem-solving skills, we offer the right environment and a huge amount of data for you to learn from, every day.

What You Will Learn & Do

As a Graduate Data Engineer, you will learn how to keep data pipelines healthy and automation tools running at peak performance. After an initial onboarding period, you will then learn on the job by working hand in hand with senior data engineers on different areas:

Operational Support: Assist in maintaining and optimizing high-volume data pipelines using Python and SQL.

API & Infrastructure: Help manage connections with key marketing APIs (Google Ads, Bing, Meta) to ensure uninterrupted data flow.

Automation Impact: Directly support key projects such as automated campaign restructuring for Hotels and robust SEM alerting tools.

Technical Documentation: document our technical processes, stabilizing the team's operational knowledge.

Data Prep: Support Data Scientists and SEM managers by transforming complex travel signals into production-ready marketing models.

Agile Mindset: Work in a fast-paced environment, participating in daily stand-ups and sprint planning to deliver incremental value.

Who You Are

We are looking for people who deeply question how things work and how they could be improved.

  • Academic Foundation: Graduate in Physics, Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, Computer Science or any other scientific field.
  • Analytical Mindset: You find and solve problems using data-driven decisions.
  • Technical Curiosity: You have a basic understanding of either Python or SQL and are eager to master them.
  • Learning Agility: You can quickly grasp new technical concepts and business logics.
  • Passionate about AI: You are curious about AI.
  • Language: Proficiency in English (our global working language).


Tech Stack You Will Learn:

  • Languages: Python, SQL
  • Transformation & Orchestration: dbt, Dagster
  • Cloud Platform: Google Cloud (BigQuery, Cloud SQL, Vertex AI)
  • Data Movement & APIs: Fivetran, Google Ads, Bing, Meta, TikTok


What’s in it for you?

  • A Rewarding Package: eDreams Prime Plus membership for travel discounts, competitive salary, flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, and your birthday off!
  • Continuous Learning: Free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, and a great onboarding program.
  • Hybrid & Flexible: A model focused on outcomes, not time-in-seat, helping you find the right work-life balance.
  • Culture & Fun: After-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and no dress code.


This is a 6-month "discovery phase" role. It allows us to evaluate your fit for potential future permanent roles while giving you world-class exposure to AI-driven marketing technology. If you are ready to soar, we are ready to take you there!

Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.
